summary: Frontend testing of KC redesign + LP-BRF-07 through LP-BRF-11. All features working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new briefs (LP-BRF-07 to LP-BRF-11) render full content with dark navy hero bands and warm ivory (#F6F3EE) reading areas. KC Index shows 'Operational Library', '11 Briefs published', 90-Day Clock Series section, and warm ivory background. Homepage correctly uses dark theme (rgb(6,13,25)). Existing briefs (LP-BRF-01) and article posts (BOC-3) also render correctly with light theme.
